scope.target: Provide case-safe canonical Codex and thin Claude root collaboration entries without duplicated instruction bodies.
files: active indexes and validators that name root entries
constraints: Use uppercase official runtime entry names.

steps: Perform a Git-visible two-step case rename to AGENTS.md.

Run targeted portability and aggregate context gates.
execution.last_completed_step: Official runtime discovery and current Git case inventory confirmed.
